Xun Jing (Shuci) иҚҖйқ– (еҸ”ж…Ҳ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Jing (иҚҖйқ–), styledShuci (еҸ”ж…Ҳ). Son of Xun Shu, uncle to Xun Yu, one of the вҖҳEight DragonsвҖҷ Xun Jing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
